checks.name: published ecCKD CKD-definition files
checks.role: Published model targets for schema validation, teacher-student recovery, and coefficient comparisons.

checks.name: CKDMIP evaluation profiles and reference fluxes
checks.role: Evaluation data for radiation-model comparison after a model has been generated.

checks.name: ecRad CKDMIP evaluation scripts
checks.role: Reference examples for evaluating CKD files in ecRad.

checks.name: ecRad runtime ecCKD source
checks.role: Runtime implementation needed to understand how published CKD-definition files are consumed.

checks.name: original LBL training database
checks.role: Upstream CKDMIP spectra, concentrations, and public flux inputs required before derived ecCKD training fluxes can be generated.

checks.name: derived ecCKD training flux products
checks.role: Derived 5-gas and relative-humidity perturbation flux products consumed by the published ecCKD optimizer scripts.

checks.name: official ecCKD generator and optimizer source
checks.role: Required to keep all non-optimizer choices identical while swapping in the Reactant/Enzyme optimizer.

checks.name: official ecCKD objective weights and training scripts
checks.role: Required to define the exact gases, profiles, spectral weights, loss terms, and stopping criteria used by the published models.

current_supported_recovery: Teacher-student coefficient recovery against published ecCKD CKD-definition files using Reactant compilation checks and Enzyme gradients.
next_required_inputs: Set RH_CKDMIP_DATA_PATH to a complete CKDMIP tree with public upstream spectra, concentration, and flux inputs.
Generate the derived ecCKD 5gas/rel training flux products locally from the upstream spectra if they are not already present.
Encode the original profile set, spectral weights, gases, loss terms, and stopping criteria before varying optimizer settings.
